headline: Cricut Joy 2 for Father's Day gifts at lowest price
summary: The Cricut Joy 2 Rainbow Essential Bundle is at its lowest price ever. It helps personalize Father's Day and graduation gifts. The bundle includes vinyl, cardstock, iron-on materials, and more.

headline: Microsoft Build 2026: Windows, AI, and RTX Spark News
summary: Microsoft's Build 2026 developer conference kicks off on June 2nd. Expect news on new AI models and Windows updates. The keynote presentation will stream live, with coverage available.

headline: Ableton Live now supports browser-style JavaScript extensions
summary: Ableton introduces an Extensions SDK for its Live digital audio workstation. Musicians can now build new features using common JavaScript. This expands capabilities beyond Max for Live's audio processing.

headline: Camp Snap 2 screenless camera is slimmer with more filters
summary: The Camp Snap 2 is a sequel to the screenless digital point-and-shoot camera. It features a slimmer design and faster performance. The camera now comes with filters available right out of the box.

headline: IGN Live 2026: Forza Horizon 6 and 007 among playable games
summary: IGN Live 2026 has unveiled its full lineup of over 40 playable games. Highlights include Forza Horizon 6, offering a new racing experience. The highly anticipated 007: First Light will also be playable.

headline: Tom Holland: The Odyssey 'almost saved' Spider-Man: Brand New Day
summary: Tom Holland revealed he requested a delay for Spider-Man: Brand New Day production. This was to film Christopher Nolan's 'The Odyssey'. Holland suggests this decision 'almost saved' the Spider-Man movie.

headline: Backrooms Sequel Confirmed to be in the Works
summary: A sequel to the popular Backrooms project is officially in development. Further details about the upcoming project are expected soon. Fans can anticipate more content from the Backrooms universe.

headline: LEGO Pokémon expands with 12 new Smart Play sets
summary: LEGO has announced a new line-up of Pokémon Smart Play sets. There are 12 designs featuring popular characters like Pikachu and Charizard. The sets utilize new Smart Play technology for enhanced interaction.

headline: Police bodycam shows handcuffing of dying stabbed student
summary: Police bodycam footage reveals officers handcuffing a stabbed student as he lay dying. The victim, Henry Nowak, had been falsely accused by his killer. Vickrum Digwa, the killer, lied, claiming racial abuse.

headline: Murrell used fake invoices for £400k spending spree
summary: The former SNP chief executive, Peter Murrell, used fake invoices. He admitted embezzling £400,000 from the party funds. Murrell is now facing a lengthy jail sentence for his crime.

headline: Mandelson files leave five questions unanswered
summary: A second batch of files relating to Lord Mandelson's appointment has been released. The documents concern his role as US ambassador. Five critical questions remain unanswered by the newly disclosed files.

headline: British couple lose Iran jail sentence appeal
summary: A British couple, Lindsay and Craig Foreman, lost their appeal against an Iranian jail sentence. They were arrested in January 2025 during a global motorbike journey. Their family confirmed the appeal's failure.
